entries.title: From IndyCar royalty to NASCAR dynasty: How Penske conquered American racing
entries.summary: Roger Penske's racing enterprises have long been synonymous with IndyCar, but now they've built the most decorated team in recent NASCAR history, too.

entries.title: Racing around Cowboys', Rangers' stadiums was just what IndyCar needed
entries.summary: Racing around the homes of the Cowboys and Rangers made IndyCar's Grand Prix of Arlington the signature event that the sport has been desperate for.

entries.title: Alpine denies Colapinto 'sabotage,' slams abuse
entries.summary: Alpine has written an open letter refuting "completely unfounded" fan allegations that they have been sabotaging the car and competitive chances of their Argentinan driver Franco Colapinto.

entries.title: F1 Academy adds races after Saudi cancellation
entries.summary: The all-women F1 Academy has added extra races to their existing schedule in Montreal and Austin to account for the cancellation of the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix in April.

entries.title: Brundle to 'boring' Max: Leave, or stop talking
entries.summary: Martin Brundle has said Max Verstappen should either leave Formula 1 "or stop talking about it," claiming his comments are "boring" and that no driver is "indispensable."
